creator: alexey@renatasystems.org
text:
This package provides a unified command line interface to many Amazon Web Services.

The currently supported services include:

  * Amazon Elastic Compute Cloud (Amazon EC2)
  
  * Elastic Load Balancing
  
  * Auto Scaling
  
  * AWS CloudFormation
  
  * AWS Elastic Beanstalk
  
  * Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS)
  
  * Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS)
  
  * Amazon Relational Database Service (Amazon RDS)
  
  * AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM)
  
  * AWS Security Token Service (STS)
  
  * Amazon CloudWatch
  
  * Amazon Simple Email Service (Amazon SES)

The aws-cli package should work on Python versions 2.6.x - 3.3.x.

Pre-requisites: 

 * ports/174672: devel/py-dateutil: update to 2.1

   http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=174672
 
 * ports/174673: import of devel/py-botocore:

   http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=174673

WWW:

 * http://aws.amazon.com/cli/

 * https://github.com/aws/aws-cli
